source_title: Force Fiber & XBraidTT Suture Tape — Brochure
text: XBraid TT, Force Fiber and XBraid S XBraid TT is a smooth, low profile, 100% ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene suture tape designed to increase tendon-to-bone contact in soft tissue repairs. The custom design of the XBraidTT allows the suture to lie flat against the tissue to increase the suture footprint. XBraid TT Features and benefits • XBraid TT is a tie-able tape with comparable knot stacks to #2 suture. • Designed with lubricity in mind, XBraid TT easily slides after anchor insertion and during knot tying. • Easy to open packaging designed to help with efficiency in the operating room. • Custom braid technology provides a suture tape that is specifically designed to not fold under tension. • Ultimate tissue pull through load: 206N2 Product number Description 3910900010 1.0mm XBraid TT, blue/black, suture tape, CT-3 (taper, 1/2c, 22mm), 28" suture 3910900044 1.0mm XBraid TT, blue/black,
